intents.response: Hello! Welcome to Your College. How may I assist you today?
Admissions are based on entrance exam scores aka MHT CET and eligibility criteria. Please visit the admission office for details.
We offer Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Artificial Intelligence and Data Science,Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Electronics and Computer Engineering.
The fee structure varies by Category and Admission Year FY/DSY and Academic Performance. Please contact the accounts department for the latest details.
Our college provides placement assistance and conducts campus recruitment drives every year.
Government and merit-based scholarships are available for eligible students as per there category and Academic Performances.
Separate hostel facilities are available for boys and girls.
Our library contains thousands of books, journals, and digital learning resources.
You can contact the college administration at info@Yourscollege.edu.
Thank you for visiting. Have a great day!
